allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\('backend/'+f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['models.py','schemas.py','risk.py','seed_data.py','ai_pipeline.py','main.py','routes/cases.py','routes/ai.py','routes/upload.py']]; print\('All backend files parse OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\('backend/'+f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['schemas.py','routes/cases.py']]; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'total={d[\\"total\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"case_id\\"]}  {c[\\"severity_level\\"] or \\"-\\"}  {c[\\"case_notes\\"][:60] if c[\\"case_notes\\"] else \\"\\"}'\) for c in d['cases'][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); aq=d['air_quality']; print\(f'total_open={aq[\\"total_open\\"]}  urgent={aq[\\"urgent\\"]}  sla_breach={aq[\\"sla_breach\\"]}'\); print\(f'by_severity={aq[\\"by_severity\\"]}'\); print\(f'Westfield Primary in by_school:', \\"Westfield Primary School\\" in aq['by_school']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'school: {d[\\"name\\"]}'\); print\(f'timeframe: {d[\\"timeframe\\"]}'\); print\(f'latest: {d[\\"latest_reading\\"][\\"month\\"]} AQI={d[\\"latest_reading\\"][\\"air_quality_index\\"]}'\); print\('pollutants:'\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"display_name\\"]:<12} {p[\\"value\\"]:>7} {p[\\"unit\\"]:<8} rag={p[\\"rag\\"]:<5} pct={p[\\"pct_of_threshold\\"]} certainty={p[\\"certainty\\"]} trend={p[\\"trend\\"]}'\) for p in d['pollutants']]; print\(f'parent_reports: {len\(d[\\"parent_reports\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'summary: {d[\\"parent_reports_summary\\"]}'\)")
